PLTR.last_run_window: First run — Mon 29 Jun (Nvidia/Surf Air announcement) through Fri 3 Jul ~9:00am MYT (US market closed today for observed July 4th holiday; window extended back to the start of the current catalyst cluster since this is PLTR's first digest)

Trump financial disclosure shows $1M+ PLTR stake, ~$260k added in Q1 2026
